## Abilities & Aptitudes

911 Emergency Dispatcher

Featured

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of 911 Emergency Dispatcher skills. It covers several topics, including Asking the Right Questions, Clerical Work, Crisis Management, Law Enforcement Information, Non-Emergency Calls, Prioritizing, and Telecommunications and Teamwork.

Legal, Safety & Administration

Accounting and Bookkeeping Principles

Popular

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Accounting and Bookkeeping Principles (AUS/NZ). The test covers several topics, including Working with the General Ledger, Accounting Fundamentals, Working with Accounts Payable, and Managing Inventory.

Accounting & Financial

Active Server Pages .NET

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of the Active Server Pages .NET technology. The test covers several topics, including Programming and Design Architecture, Deployment and Compiling, Caching and Optimization, and Web Controls.

Application & Web Development

ActiveX

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of the ActiveX technology. The test covers several topics, including ASP, Server and Client-side Scripting, Functions, and Procedures.

Application & Web Development

Administrative Assistant

This test measures the candidate's knowledge of Administrative Assistant. The test covers several topics, including Communication Skills, Technical Proficiency, Professionalism and Work Ethic, Administrative Knowledge and Experience, Organizational Skills, Interpersonal Skills.

Primary Work Skills

Administrative Assistant in a School Setting

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Administrative Assistant in a School Setting. The test covers several topics, including Communication Skills, Customer Service, Financial, Recordkeeping, Safety and Confidentiality, Scheduling and Calendar Management and Writing Skills.

Education

Adobe Acrobat

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe Acrobat 9.0. The test covers several topics, including Searching and Indexing, Editing PDFs, Workspace, and Multimedia and 3D Models.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe After Effects

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe After Effects 22. It covers several topics, including Animation, Effects, Layers, Motion Graphics, Tools, and VFX.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe ColdFusion

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe ColdFusion 9. The test covers several topics, including Building User Interfaces, ColdFusion ORM, Managing Documents, Images, and Charts, and Programming Fundamentals.

Application & Web Development

Adobe Creative Cloud CC (InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop)

This test measures a candidate's knowledge of Adobe Creative Cloud CC (InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop) skills across 15 subject areas. Subjects include Illustrator Artboards, Guides, and Layers, Illustrator Color Modes, Color Application, and Gradients, Illustrator File Importing and Exporting, Illustrator Pen Tool, Drawing Shapes, and Bezier Curves, among others.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe Dreamweaver

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe Dreamweaver CS3. The test covers several topics, including Workspace, Creating Pages with HTML and CSS, and Dreamweaver CS3 Environment.

Application & Web Development

Adobe Fireworks

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of the Adobe Fireworks CS3 for Windows. The test covers several topics, including Fireworks Environment, Pages, Layers, Masking, and Working with Vector Objects.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe Flash

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe Flash CS3 Professional. The test covers several topics, including Using Symbols and Instances, Buttons, Working with Flash Documents and Projects, and Workspace.

Application & Web Development

Adobe Flex

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of the Adobe Flex 4.0 technology. The test covers several topics, including Using and Creating Components, Data Validation and Regular Expression, and AS3 in Flex.

Application & Web Development

Adobe Illustrator

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe Illustrator 4.0. The test covers several topics, including Working with Pages and Files, Drawing, and Page Views.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe InDesign

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe InDesign CC 2017. It covers several topics, including Digital Publications, Editing and Formatting Text, Exporting and Publishing, Layout and Design, Printing, and Typography.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe PageMaker

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe PageMaker 4.0. The test covers several topics, including Toolbar and Default Settings, Working with Files, Graphics Control.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe PhotoShop

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe Photoshop CS3 for Macintosh. The test covers several topics, including Technical Imaging, Retouching and Transforming, Automating with Actions, and Video and Animation.

Desktop Publishing Software

Adobe Premiere Pro

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Adobe Premiere Pro 22. It covers several topics, including Basics, Effects and Transitions, Importing and Exporting, Sound, Timeline, and Tools.

Desktop Publishing Software

Agile Management

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Agile Management. It covers several topics, including Agile Mindset, Agile Ways of Working, Adaptive Planning, Value Delivery, and Agile Organizations.

Application & Web Development

AI - Basic Artificial Intelligence Knowledge

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Basic Artificial Intelligence. It covers several topics, including Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, and Natural Language Processing.

Databases & Business Intelligence

AI Ethics

The test measures the candidate's knowledge of AI Ethics. It covers several topics, including AI and Human Rights, AI in Society, Accountability and Responsibility, Autonomy and Control, Bias and Fairness in AI, Privacy and Data Protection, Transparency and explainability.

AI Tools and Practices

Ajax Frameworks

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of the Ajax Frameworks. The test covers several topics, including Basic Knowledge, PHP, Java, .NET, and JavaScript Frameworks.

Application & Web Development

Ajax Programming

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of the Ajax Programming. The test covers several topics, including Using JavaScript, DOM, Server-Side Technologies, and JSON.

Application & Web Development

Amazon Redshift

This test measures the candidate’s knowledge of Amazon Redshift. It covers several topics, including Architecture, Common Errors, Data Management, Performance, Query, Security, and Spectrum.

Databases & Business Intelligence
